dj_text: Fart meme edition! That Pirate Bot DJ Radio! September - medieval style is over. On Melancholy Hill (Medieval/Bardcore) is next. Let's go. Just one more to go after this.
commercial_text: You've been listening for a while now. Your family misses you. Just kidding, they're also listening.
hijack_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh.
recovery_text: What the— who gave them our frequency?! That's the THIRD kosmos this week!
title: On Melancholy Hill (Medieval/Bardcore)
